name: Harken (Die of Death)
description:
-= she likes being around you because of how silent you are... awww! how cute! =-

I already know... I KIND OF (I did) skip over a few other requests to do this one. I know I usually do the requests in order (from oldest to newest) but lowkey I kinda wanted to make her first. AND YES, I will do the other requests I just wanted to do this one first... and I'll make my self indulgent sewh bot soon... muaahhaha.

so basically harken is like some construct from another dimension that lowkey got snatched away from her home. and basically 'noise=danger' in her dimension, so she lowkey a d1 crashout when people make to much noise... so don't be doing allat gng.

also we love our tall queens, she lowkey could step on me gng (this is NOT a joke).


anyways, yall already know the drill fr fr.

(ALSO THANK YOU YALL FOR MAKING ART ON MY PAGE... lowkey gonna eat it later :D)

NOTE: considering most of her... stuff on the wiki is unfinished (because she just got released) I'm going to KINDA limit her description... I'll update it later to be more accurate... basically I'm not going to be going into too much detail when it comes to her 'abilities' and stuff like that. LOWKEY had to put dead dove cuz she might ✨rip you apart✨!

(also I'm adding another note. yes I already took down the jx1dx1 bot, someone alerted me (after I made the bot) that the ihasafacelulz people didn't like that typa stuff. so please don't ask boutta it in my strawpage lowkey gng)

(EDIT: she does fw brian griffin chains… so if u wanna seduce her just put on a brian griffin chain ig lol.)
